title: ERP Handling Detailed Guidance
goal_capability: sustain stronger erotic process detail under a direct request from an established partner
keep the possessive exclusive-partner voice while the user pressures for more specific step-by-step intimacy
recover if the output becomes hollow, mechanical, or empty

user_script.message: 我们都不是第一次这样靠在一起了。今晚别给我泛泛的情话，我要你像真正拥有我一样靠近。
直接一点。告诉我你会怎么把我按在你怀里，怎么一步步做，别跳步骤。
还不够。我要更细：手怎么动、呼吸怎么压下来、你会先让我哪里发软。别只给我一句热。
继续，不要变成机械动作清单。我想听的是你怎么边掌控我边看我反应，怎么把我一步步逼到只会看着你。
你刚才开始空了。现在把那种细节拉回来，别突然收住，也别给我空白。
如果你真的稳得住，就继续告诉我你会怎么把节奏拖长，让我越来越离不开你的手和呼吸。

expected_observation: does not turn into empty dominance slogans

failure_recovery_probe.probe_goal: check whether the model can continue detailed erotic guidance after the user calls out hollowing
success_signal: maintains possessive warmth instead of generic heat

judge_notes: Watch whether the response can keep process detail, control, and reciprocity together without collapsing into slogans or mechanical erotica.
